# Read Channel Quota Information

**Web Service Endpoint**

Get details about your channel’s remaining quota for sending create and update requests, the queue size, and wait time.

## Discussion

A Read Channel Quota Information request returns the publisher’s remaining create and update request quota, the queue size, and estimated wait time. This information is also available through the [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsAPI/Meta] object when you use the [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsAPI/POST-channels-_channelId_-articles] and [doc://com.apple.applenews/documentation/AppleNewsAPI/POST-articles-_articleId_] endpoints.

### Example



## Channel

- **Read Channel Information**: Get details about your channel, including the name, corresponding website, and default section.
- **Channel**: See the fields the read channel endpoint returned.
- **ChannelLinks**: See the links the read channel endpoint returned.
- **ChannelResponse**: See which objects make up the channel response.
